message.content:
@startuml
participant "loggedInOrgAdmin" as Admin1
participant "loggedInOrgAdmin" as Admin2

participant "frontend" as Frontend1
participant "frontend" as Frontend2

participant "UserController" as UserCtrl1
participant "UserController" as UserCtrl2

participant "UserService" as UserSvc1
participant "UserService" as UserSvc2

participant "AclUpdateHelper" as AclUpdateHelper1
participant "AclUpdateHelper" as AclUpdateHelper2

Admin1 ..> Frontend1 : add coach role for myself
Admin2 ..> Frontend2 : add coach role for myself

Frontend1 ..> UserCtrl1 : addCoachRoleToOrgAdmin(org_id)
UserCtrl1 ..> UserCtrl2 : addCoachRoleToLoggedInUser(org_id) (Check user is org admin)
UserCtrl2 ..> UserSvc1 : add acl permission to user
UserSvc1 ..> AclUpdateHelper1 : add acl permission to user
AclUpdateHelper1 ..> AclUpdateHelper2 : add acl permission to user

@enduml
